title: disa tenella var. brachyceras
intro: Disa tenella var. brachyceras, also known as the 'short-flowered disa', is a plant species belonging to the orchid family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Disa tenella var. brachyceras include infusions and decoctions, often used in traditional remedies to treat various ailments.
